description: Heywood Phase 1 — Individual student performance data across TBS three-pillar grading system. PII: Yes (linked to student identifiers). PIA threshold analysis required.

columns.name: StudentEDIPI
columns.description: 10-digit EDIPI — primary student identifier. PII.

columns.name: LastName
columns.description: Student last name. PII.

columns.name: FirstName
columns.description: Student first name. PII.

columns.name: SPCAssigned
columns.description: Staff Platoon Commander responsible for this student

columns.name: ClassNumber
columns.description: TBS class identifier (e.g., '1-26' for first class of 2026)

columns.name: AcademicExam1
columns.description: Phase I written exam score (percentage)

columns.name: AcademicExam2
columns.description: Phase II written exam score (percentage)

columns.name: AcademicExam3
columns.description: Phase III written exam score (percentage)

columns.name: AcademicExam4
columns.description: Phase IV written exam score (percentage)

columns.name: AcademicQuizAvg
columns.description: Running average of all quiz scores

columns.name: AcademicComposite
columns.formula: Average of exams and quiz average — weighted per TBS grading policy
columns.description: Overall academics score (32% of total grade)

columns.name: MilSkillsComposite
columns.formula: Weighted composite of PFT, CFT, rifle, pistol, land nav, obstacles — per TBS grading policy
columns.description: Overall military skills score (32% of total grade)

columns.name: LeadershipWeek12
columns.description: Midpoint leadership evaluation score (14% of total grade). SPC-assigned.

columns.name: LeadershipWeek22
columns.description: Final leadership evaluation score (22% of total grade). SPC-assigned.

columns.name: PeerEvalWeek12
columns.description: Midpoint peer evaluation score (portion of leadership grade)

columns.name: PeerEvalWeek22
columns.description: Final peer evaluation score (portion of leadership grade)

columns.name: LeadershipComposite
columns.formula: Week12 (14%) + Week22 (22%) with SPC (90%) and Peer (10%) weighting
columns.description: Overall leadership score (36% of total grade)

columns.name: OverallComposite
columns.description: Total TBS grade — determines class standing and MOS assignment

columns.name: ClassStandingThird
columns.description: Updated after each graded event

columns.name: CompanyRank
columns.description: Rank order within company (1 = highest)

columns.name: AtRiskFlag
columns.description: Auto-set or manually flagged when student falls below threshold

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: SPC notes — do not include PHI

views.name: Company Overview
views.description: All active students in one company, sorted by CompanyRank

views.name: My Record
views.description: Student sees only their own record

rowLevelSecurity.SPC: Filtered by Company = SPC's assigned company
rowLevelSecurity.Student: Filtered by StudentEDIPI = current user's EDIPI
